scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Strategy.ts --network localhost --reset --parameters ignition/parameters/hardhat.json && npm run generate-abi && bun run scripts/configure-factory-ens.ts
scripts.deploy:sepolia: npm run build && npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Strategy.sepolia.ts --network sepolia --parameters ignition/parameters/sepolia.json && npm run generate-abi
scripts.deploy:mainnet: npm run build && npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Strategy.production.ts --network mainnet --parameters ignition/parameters/mainnet.json && npm run generate-abi
